case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. EDUARDO SILVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF H OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 70714776) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 670 EDDY ST. #206 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL COCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70714776)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO DOES 1 TO 10
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70714776), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED AUG-11-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70714776) AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDUARDO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $6.86 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 70714776) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
